attention3.ptxt: For type distinction of OBD system, refer to “Discrimination for OBD System” under OBD System Description .

s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool or CAN communication OBD generic scan tool (type A and B) to DLC in the same manner as when making this connection for DTC check.
Set ignition OFF and then ON.
Clear DTC and pending DTC according to instructions displayed on scan tool. Refer to scan tool operator's manual for further details.
After completing the clearance, set ignition OFF and disconnect scan tool from DLC.

attention3.ptxt: DTC and freeze frame data stored in ECM memory are also cleared in the following case. Be careful not to clear them before recording them.

item.ptxt: When the same malfunction (DTC) is not detected again during 40 engine warm-up cycles. (See “Warm-Up Cycle” under OBD System Description .)
